title: EDEN experiment config
description: Declarative input to an EDEN experiment. Fields here are the host-mechanism-independent core: objective, evaluation schema, concurrency bound, termination bounds. Role bindings (how the ideator, executor, and evaluator are hosted — local subprocess, HTTP service, etc.) are implementation-defined and travel under additional properties; chapter 03 defines the role contracts but explicitly defers a normative role-binding representation to a future v0 addition or a v1 chapter (see 03-roles.md §6).

max_wall_time.description: Hard ceiling on elapsed wall time; format is a positive integer followed by one of s, m, h, d.

expr.description: Scalar expression over fields of evaluation_schema.

convergence_window.description: Terminate if the objective has not improved in this many variants.

target_condition.description: Condition over evaluation that terminates the experiment when satisfied.

dispatch_mode.description: Per-decision-type gate on orchestrator-role automation; see 02-data-model.md §2.5 and 03-roles.md §6.1. Every key defaults to 'auto'; an omitted key is equivalent to 'auto'. Unknown keys are tolerated and ignored by conforming implementations.

ideation_creation.description: When 'auto', the orchestrator runs its ideation-creation policy. When 'manual', operators in the 'admins' group drive ideation-task creation via POST /tasks.

execution_dispatch.description: When 'auto', the orchestrator creates one execution task per ready idea. When 'manual', no caller can drive the decision in v0+12a-2 (a future spec lineage broadens authority); the deployment SHOULD leave this 'auto' and use reassign_task for per-task routing control.

evaluation_dispatch.description: When 'auto', the orchestrator creates one evaluation task per starting variant with commit_sha set. When 'manual', operators in the 'admins' group drive evaluation-task creation via POST /tasks.

integration.description: When 'auto', the orchestrator invokes the integrator on success variants. When 'manual', the operator drives integration via POST /variants/{T}/integrate.
